login.title: Admin Login
login.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a one-time login code
login.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
login.notAdmin: This email is not registered as an admin
login.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Recruitment Dashboard
dashboard.noRecruitments: No recruitments yet. Create one to get started.
dashboard.verificationEndDateHelper: The verification stage can only be ended manually by an admin, regardless of this date.

stages.title: Stages
stages.endDateHelper: The recruitment end date will be updated to match the verification stage's end date.
stages.verificationEndDateHelper: The verification stage can only be ended manually by an admin.
stages.confirmEndStage: End this stage now? The end date will be set to now and the next stage will become active.
stages.confirmActivateNow: Activate "{name}" now? Its start date will be set to now.
stages.noSupplementaryWarningDesc: Ending this stage will end the whole recruitment. If you plan any further supplementary stages add them before completing this admin stage.

requirements.title: Eligible Student Levels
requirements.description: Select which student levels are eligible to apply for this recruitment.
requirements.warningDesc: The following levels you are removing already have completed registrations:
requirements.warningConfirmation: Those registrations will remain unchanged, but students with these levels will no longer be eligible to apply. Do you want to continue?

results.title: Assignment Results
results.approveConfirm: Approve these assignment results? Emails will be sent to all students.
results.activateNextStageDesc: The next stage {name} is pending. Do you want to activate it now? Its start date will be set to the current time.

applications.title: Review Applications
applications.editPendingTitle: Save or cancel pending edits first
applications.noSupplementaryDesc: Ending this stage will end the whole recruitment. If you plan any further supplementary stages add them before completing this admin stage.

conflict.title: Slot Conflict — Teacher Decision Required
conflict.description: {count} students with the same score are competing for {slots} {slotType} at {destination}.
conflict.selectExactly: Select exactly {count} students to award the slots

registration.title: Student Registration
registration.alreadyCompletedDesc: You have already completed your registration. You can update your information until the initial stage closes.
registration.initialStageClosedDesc: The initial registration stage has ended. You can no longer update your information.

welcome.registrationNotOpen: Registration is currently closed. No changes are possible.
welcome.supplementaryPlanned: A supplementary registration stage is planned: {name} ({startDate} – {endDate}).

step1.title: Contact Information & Consent
step1.emailConsentLabel: I consent to receiving emails about this recruitment
step1.privacyLabel: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy
step1.emailLockedNote: Email address is locked. Verify your identity via the code sent to this email to continue editing.

step3.title: Personal Information
step3.nameLockedNote: Name is locked. Please complete email verification to edit.

step4.title: Study Level
step4.lockedNote: Study level cannot be changed during supplementary registration.

step5.title: Spoken Languages
step5.desc: Select all languages you speak at a communicative level
step5.lockedNote: Languages cannot be changed during supplementary registration.

step6.title: Destination Preferences
step6.desc: Rank your destination preferences (most preferred first). You can select up to {max} destinations.
step6.noDestinations: No destinations match your language profile and study level. Please go back and update your languages.

step7.title: Summary
step7.desc: Please review all your information carefully.
step7.confirmLabel: I have reviewed all the above information and confirm it is correct

completed.title: Registration Complete!
completed.desc: Your registration has been submitted successfully. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.

supplementaryWarning.title: Supplementary Stage — Your assignment may be affected
supplementaryWarning.message: You are currently assigned to {destination}. Editing your registration will cancel your current assignment. Students who do not edit their registration are guaranteed to keep their current assignment.
supplementaryWarning.confirmLabel: I understand that editing my registration means I lose my current assignment ({assignment})

errors.slotTaken: This registration slot is no longer available
errors.destinationFull: One of your selected destinations is no longer available. Please update your preferences.
errors.privacyRequired: You must agree to the privacy policy
errors.emailConsentRequired: You must consent to email communication
errors.invalidEnrollmentId: Enrollment ID must be a 6-digit number not starting with 0
errors.assignmentLossConfirmRequired: You must confirm that you understand editing will cancel your current assignment
errors.noLanguagesSelected: Please select at least one language
errors.noDestinationSelected: Please select at least one destination
errors.confirmRequired: Please confirm all your information is correct

teacher.title: Teacher Management
teacher.noStudent: No student has registered for this slot yet
teacher.invalidSignature: This link is invalid or has been tampered with
teacher.noRegistration: No completed registration for this slot.

supplementary.title: Supplementary Stage
supplementary.unassigned: You were not assigned to any destination
supplementary.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your assignment? This will free up your spot and you'll have to compete for a new destination.
supplementary.stageNotActive: The supplementary stage is not currently active

otp.subject: Your login code
otp.title: Your one-time login code
otp.body: Use the code below to log in. It expires in 10 minutes.
otp.ignore: If you didn't request this code, you can safely ignore this email.

registrationCompleted.subject: Registration complete — {recruitmentName}
registrationCompleted.title: Registration Complete
registrationCompleted.body: Your registration for {recruitmentName} has been completed successfully.
registrationCompleted.updateNote: You can update your information until the initial registration stage closes.

initialStageClosed.subject: Registration period closed — {recruitmentName}
initialStageClosed.title: Registration Period Closed
initialStageClosed.body: The initial registration period for {recruitmentName} has closed. Your registration is confirmed and has been forwarded for review.
initialStageClosed.reviewNote: The administrative review stage is expected to conclude by {date}. You will receive an email when your destination assignment is finalized.
initialStageClosed.thanks: Thank you for participating in the recruitment process.

assignmentApproved.subject: Destination assignment — {recruitmentName}
assignmentApproved.title: Your Destination Assignment
assignmentApproved.body: We are pleased to inform you that you have been assigned to the following destination for {recruitmentName}:
assignmentApproved.congratulations: Congratulations! Further details about your trip will be communicated separately.
assignmentApproved.supplementaryInfo: Please note that a supplementary stage has been scheduled for {recruitmentName}, running from {startDate} to {endDate}.

assignmentUnassigned.subject: Assignment result — {recruitmentName}
assignmentUnassigned.title: Assignment Result
assignmentUnassigned.body: Unfortunately, we were unable to assign you to any of your selected destinations for {recruitmentName} in this round. This may be due to high competition for your preferred destinations.
assignmentUnassigned.supplementaryInfo: A supplementary stage has been scheduled for {recruitmentName}, running from {startDate} to {endDate}. You will have another opportunity to apply and be assigned to a destination during this period.
assignmentUnassigned.noSupplementary: We will notify you if a supplementary stage becomes available.

supplementaryStageClosed.subject: Supplementary stage closed — {recruitmentName}
supplementaryStageClosed.title: Supplementary Stage Closed
supplementaryStageClosed.body: The supplementary registration stage for {recruitmentName} has closed. Your registration has been confirmed and forwarded for administrative review.
supplementaryStageClosed.reviewNote: The administrative review stage is expected to conclude by {date}. You will receive an email when your destination assignment is finalized.

supplementaryStage.subject: Supplementary stage open — {recruitmentName}
supplementaryStage.title: Supplementary Stage Now Open
supplementaryStage.body: A supplementary registration stage has opened for {recruitmentName}.
supplementaryStage.guaranteed: Your place is guaranteed — you do not need to take any action.
supplementaryStage.changeNote: If you would like to change your destination preferences, you can re-apply using your registration link below.
supplementaryStage.warning: Warning: Re-applying will immediately cancel your current assignment to {destination}. There is no guarantee you will be assigned to your new preferences.
supplementaryStage.noAssignment: You were not assigned to a destination in the previous round. You can use this supplementary stage to apply again.
supplementaryStage.closesNote: This stage closes on {date}. After that, assignments will be finalized.
